document.title: Type Certificate
authorityOrJurisdiction: Ministry of Internal Affairs and Communications
standards: Ordinance Concerning Technical Regulations Conformity Certification etc. of Specified Radio Equipment Article 19
Ordinance Concerning Technical Regulations Conformity Certification etc. of Specified Radio Equipment Article 20
MIC ordinance No.27 of 2019, supplementary provisions, para.4
Order 67 of the Ministry of Internal Affairs and Communications

sourceSummary.oneLine: Type Certificate for Laird Connectivity LLC ST60/SU60 5GHz band low power data communication system models under certified number 003-170090.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Documents Japan Radio Law type certification and related GITEKI conformity marking and certified dealer inspection-record obligations.
keyPoints: Certified to Laird Connectivity LLC for specified radio equipment classified as Article 2-1-19-3-2, 5GHz band low power data communication system.
Certified number is 003-170090 and certified date is July 28, 2023.
The certificate states certification by type has been granted in accordance with Article 38-24, Paragraph 1 of the Radio Law.
The conformity mark may be physically affixed or electronically displayed under the stated certification regulation methods.
Certified dealers must inspect products before shipping and retain inspection records for 10 years.

entities.name: Ministry of Internal Affairs and Communications
entities.evidence: The Minister of Internal Affairs and Communications can prohibit the certified dealer from affixing the conformity mark

entities.name: Radio Law
entities.evidence: in accordance with the provisions of Article 38-24, Paragraph 1 of the Radio Law

concepts.name: Type certification for specified radio equipment
concepts.evidence: This is to certify that the above mentioned certification by type has been granted in accordance with the provisions of Article 38-24, Paragraph 1 of the Radio Law.

concepts.name: 5GHz band low power data communication system
concepts.pageTarget: 5GHz band low power data communication system
concepts.evidence: 5GHz band low power data communication system (5.6GHz Out-Door Use)

concepts.name: Technical conformity mark
concepts.evidence: Certification label, technical conformity mark (GITEKI mark), etc.

concepts.name: Certified dealer inspection records
concepts.evidence: Certified dealer must then “make record of the inspection results” and “retain the inspection records for 10 years.”

concepts.name: Electronic conformity mark display
concepts.pageTarget: Electronic display of GITEKI conformity mark
concepts.evidence: the law allows that the conformity mark may be electronically shown on the equipment’s display

evidence.claim: The document is a Type Certificate certified to Laird Connectivity LLC.
evidence.evidenceText: Type Certificate Certified to Laird Connectivity LLC

evidence.claim: The specified radio equipment classification is Article 2-1-19-3-2 for a 5GHz band low power data communication system.
evidence.evidenceText: Classification of specified radio equipment Article 2-1-19-3-2 5GHz band low power data communication system (5.6GHz Out-Door Use)
evidence.pageTarget: Article 2-1-19-3-2 5GHz band low power data communication system

evidence.claim: The certified models are ST60-2230C, SU60-2230C, ST60-2230C-P, ST60-2230C-SS, ST60-2230C-PU, ST60-2230C-UU, ST60-2230C-U, and ST60-2230C-Q.
Certification by type was granted under Article 38-24, Paragraph 1 of the Radio Law.
evidence.evidenceText: This is to certify that the above mentioned certification by type has been granted in accordance with the provisions of Article 38-24, Paragraph 1 of the Radio Law.

evidence.claim: The certificate applies MIC ordinance No.27 of 2019 supplementary provisions paragraph 4 transitional measures.
evidence.evidenceText: *Apply "MIC ordinance No.27 of 2019, supplementary provisions, para.4 (Transitional Measures: Certification under the old regulations)"
evidence.pageTarget: MIC ordinance No.27 of 2019 transitional measures

evidence.claim: A change of certified dealer was notified to MIC on December 26, 2022.
evidence.evidenceText: *Notified to the MIC on December 26, 2022 (Change of certified dealer)

evidence.claim: If the conformity mark is not displayed, the equipment is not recognized as radio equipment with conformity mark and is subject to a separate radio station license.
evidence.evidenceText: If the conformity mark is not displayed, the equipment will not be recognized as “radio equipment with conformity mark” as specified in Articles 4-2 and 4-3 of the Law, and is subject to obtaining a separate license for radio station.

evidence.claim: Certified dealers must inspect certified products before shipping and retain inspection records for 10 years.
evidence.evidenceText: Before shipping the certified product, a certified dealer shall “inspect” to make sure the product has performance identical to that of the certified construction type. Certified dealer must then “make record of the inspection results” and “retain the inspection records for 10 years.”

reviewFlags.reason: Authority is partly inferred from legal references and DSP Research certificate text; the document does not explicitly state DSP Research's registration status beyond related explanatory text.
Source text appears to be OCR or extracted PDF text with line breaks and fragmented ordering in the marking instructions.
